description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a compact, streamlined design. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, featuring a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics or accessories. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type with a brown coloration, suggesting polymer or composite material. The stock is a fixed, tactical style with a pronounced cheek rest and ergonomic grip, designed for stability and control. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall build is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban law enforcement or tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a brown curved magazine, full-length rail, and ergonomic fixed stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the brown curved magazine, fixed tactical stock, and top rail.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, rail alignment, and minimal width of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's cheek rest, grip, and the alignment of the receiver and rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
